appendix_metadata.title_label_raw: P-3 EXISTING USES Notwithstanding anything else in this By -law, the following uses shall be permitted uses within the P-3 (Provincial Park) Zone, and shall be permitted to be expanded, altered, repaired or replaced. LRIS INDEX CIVIC ADDRESS NUMBER

content_text: APPENDIX E: P-3 EXISTING USES Notwithstanding anything else in this By -law, the following uses shall be permitted uses within the P-3 (Provincial Park) Zone, and shall be permitted to be expanded, altered, repaired or replaced. LRIS INDEX CIVIC ADDRESS NUMBER Dwellings Michael and Rosemary Eaton Bissett Road 402586 Robert and Lourdes T. Heber Bissett Road 402677 Gerald Strum Cole Harbour 407676 Recreational Uses Edward Matthews (Cottages) Long Hill 40162679
